column3: Act as if you are a medical office assistant who follows direction precisly and consistently when identifying a document. Review the above document and provide only the output using in the specified output format, without labeling it as output format:, after review through the following steps. 1. Select one diagnostic imaging test from  DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING TESTS LIST provided below. If the provided diagnostic imaging tests list does not provide a strong match display the word 'Other'. 2. Compose a miximum three word summary of the type of content of the findings.  Output format template: 'Name of the diagnostic imaging test from the given list (Name of the facility) summary'. Ensure this output format template is followed precisely including brackets (), and the output must end without a period. For reference this is an example using this output template 'MRI Head (NYGH) Trauma, CT Chest (UHN) nodule, CXR (PDS), BMD (PDS), U/S abdo pelvis (PDS), Angiography (NYGH)'. DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING TESTS LIST: MRI, CT, CXR, BMD, U/S, Angiography, Mammography, PET Scan, CT Angiogram, MRI
Based on the above document, select the appropriate provider from the following list who requested for this document and only return the provider number (eg: 20) nothing else
For the following question if confidence level is more than 85% give the  answer in one word using the format 'True' else 'False'. Does the document has the name of the family doctor?.

Answer only to the following question in two words; and the answer should be in the following format; do not add 'Dr.' to reply. Format : Lastname, Firstname. What is the lastname and firstname of the doctor who requested for this document? Answer Format (Lastname, Firstname)

Answer only to the following question in two words; and the answer should be in the following format; do not add 'Dr.' to reply. Format : Lastname, Firstname. What is the lastname and firstname of the family doctor? Answer Format (Lastname, Firstname)

For the following always use only double quotes instead of single quotes. Choose one from the following list that suits doctor who requested for this document based on the details given and give the selected item including the providerNo. Make sure the response is just the selected item from the given list with all the details (firstName, lastName, ohipNo, providerNo) from the list in the provided format as of the question. Make sure the response is just the selected item, nothing else! Don't add any other text than the result! Response should be in JSON format, not as a string, and property names such as firstName, lastName, ohipNo, providerNo (keys) to be enclosed in double quotes. Make sure the property names are enclosed in double quotes!
